name: The Tunnel
description:
You stand at the end of a long tunnel, the long walk where the fearless
gladiators collect their final thoughts before entering the battle zone.  
There is a light at the end of the tunnel, beckoning you to enter.  You hear
the roar or the crowd, and begin to feel your animalistic instincts rise inside
of you.  Can you take that long walk...?  Above you are the stands, to your
east is the playing field.
